title: Pathophysiology of Asthma (StatPearls)
description: Reference text covering epidemiology, mechanism, and inflammatory pathology of asthma.
caption: Use as a foundational pathophysiology source for asthma sections and checkpoints.

sourceReference.fileName: Pathophysiology Of Asthma _ Treatment & Management _ Point of Care - StatPearls.pdf

title: Asthma Medications (StatPearls)
description: Medication-focused reference covering beta2 agonists, anticholinergics, inhaled corticosteroids, leukotriene therapy, theophylline, and biologics.
caption: Medication and treatment source for controller logic and case therapy planning.

sourceReference.fileName: Asthma Medications _ Treatment & Management _ Point of Care_StatPearls.pdf

title: Chapter 39 Drugs against Asthma
description: Chapter-style pharmacology source covering major bronchodilator and controller drug classes used in asthma.
caption: Supports mechanism, status asthmaticus, and controller-versus-reliever teaching.

title: Beta2-Receptor Agonists and Antagonists
description: Reference discussing beta2 receptor signaling, adverse effects, monitoring, and toxicity management.
caption: Useful for the albuterol hypokalemia case, bronchodilation mechanism, and overdose monitoring.

sourceReference.fileName: Beta2-Receptor Agonists and Antagonists - StatPearls - NCBI Bookshelf.pdf

title: Histology, Lung (StatPearls)
description: Histology reference for normal respiratory epithelium, alveolar structure, and tissue context for airway disease.
caption: Use for normal-versus-asthmatic airway comparisons and histology teaching.

title: Physiology, Lung (StatPearls)
description: Physiology reference for lung mechanics, gas exchange, and airflow behavior relevant to obstructive disease.
caption: Supports pulmonary function and airflow-limitation explanation in asthma.

title: Asthma case and albuterol slide deck
description: Teaching slide deck covering a pediatric acute asthma case, histology-pathology synthesis, and bronchodilator pharmacology integration.
caption: Primary source for the Hailey acute asthma case and slide-based histology synthesis.

title: Questions on Respiration
description: Student-generated single best answer question bank containing a chronic asthma management vignette among broader respiratory questions.
caption: Used as the source for the primary-care asthma step-up question.

title: STEP 1 Respiratory Questions
description: Board-style respiratory question source containing theophylline toxicity and albuterol hypokalemia asthma vignettes.
caption: Used for pharmacology-heavy acute asthma quiz content.
